_comment: Single source of truth for OAuth primitives. Imported by BOTH src/config/oauth.ts (the browser TS client) and scripts/gen-oauth-metadata.js (the build-time static metadata emitter), so client_id / scope / redirect_uris cannot drift. Change the domain/scope here only. defaultBaseUrl is overridable at build time via EXPO_PUBLIC_OAUTH_BASE_URL.
_scopeComment: `scope` is what NEW authorization requests ask for - keep it minimal. `declaredScope` is the (superset) scope the client METADATA advertises; it must be a superset of `scope` AND of any scope older cached web bundles still request. We declare more than we request so stale bundles (built when prod requested account:email/status) keep authorizing instead of being rejected with `invalid_scope` against the current metadata.
declaredScope: atproto transition:generic transition:email transition:chat.bsky identity:handle account:email?action=manage account:status?action=manage
